input.subject: Final Notice: Outstanding Levies - Lot 7
input.bodyProse: Dear Pat Latimer, your levy payments for Lot 7 are $1,153.85 overdue (47 days), plus $14.86 penalty interest. This is a final notice; please contact us to arrange payment or discuss a hardship plan. If unpaid, the committee will escalate recovery.
